text: my ankles tend toward supination , so a well - cushioned heel is crucial . every other pair of nbs i own give great even support , but the outer heels on this pair collapsed after less than a week ! the shoes now slant outward in a very unsafe and totally unacceptable way that makes my supination way worse . they are completely unusable - huge waste of money . don ' t buy this pair unless you have a perfectly even foot strike !
